---
title: "Conference Board"
page-layout: article
---

# Conference Board

## Description

Source for economic indicators, business research, and management intelligence. Supports research on economic conditions, consumer confidence, workforce trends, and organizational performance.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Access notes

Off-campus users must be logged in to Yale’s VPN OR must create an account with their @yale.edu email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-conference-board)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
